title: Expand FILES-MANIFEST.md coverage (44 undocumented scripts)
description: Only 18 of 61 script files have documentation blocks in FILES-MANIFEST.md. 44 files including WinRemote-PSTool, Show-ScanDashboard, Show-MCPServiceConfig, Show-EventLogViewer, all XHTML-Checker scripts, QUICK-APP utilities, and Script1-6 templates are undocumented.
